title: Greifenseelauf — Half Marathon
summary: Greifenseelauf — Half Marathon Source: greifenseelauf.ch — captured 2026-04-24 ## Event facts - Full name: Greifenseelauf, Uster (also called Halbmarathon Greifensee) - 2026 edition: 47. Greifenseelauf - Date: Saturday, 19 September 2026 - Location: Uster, Canton Zurich, Switzerland - Organiser: Markus Ryffel's AG, Worb ## Distances - Half Marathon: 21.1 km (main event) - 10 km - 6.3 km - Kids races (Minigreifenseelauf U8–U14, FAMIGROS RUN & WIN) ## Course - Runs through the Greifensee nature reserve - Surface: ~60% asphalt, ~40% natural roads / gravel - Start: Seestrasse, Uster (~10 min walk from Village/finish area) - Finish: Stadtpark Uster (net chip timing — clock starts when you cross start line) - Exception: Top 10 Overall finishers timed by gun time ## Aid stations — Half Marathon | Km | Location | |---|---| | 2.9 | Greifensee | | 7.4 | Fällanden | | 11.5 | Maur (+ bananas) | | 14.6 | Badi Egg | | 17.8 | Seefeldstrasse, Riedikon | | 19.5 | Talacker | | 21.1 | Finish — Stadtpark Uster | Drink order at each station: isotonic first tables, water on subsequent tables. ## Pacemakers Available for HM finish times: 1:30, 1:45, 2:00, 2:15 (and intermediate times).
